title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
